# Weighted regression {#weighted-regression}

```{r weighted-regression-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/weighted-regression-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/weighted-regression/"
)
```

```{r child-weighted-regression, child="../lecture-content/30-weighted-regression.Rmd"}
```
